data.name: 魔女的性愛囚禁
data.detailed_description:
──總感覺周圍的一切都很陌生。
“下流的公狗，說話可要誠實哦~”美麗的主人將我踩在地上，居高臨下地看著我。

◆特色系統

　◇在環境設定裡能打開全CG模式,自由瀏覽HCG

　◇無壓力操作設計-快速的文字跳轉系統

◆故事

主人說我性欲旺盛
想要糾正自己變態的行為必須要戴上貞操套
“連貞操套都治不好你.....看來得好好調教了啊"

我一直是一個好色的人，整天都想著H的事，以至於被主人稱為發情公狗.....
但我現在突然想要糾正自己的變態行為
我能夠成功嗎

不過，隨著調教的進行，我卻感覺自己是在變得越發好色
這真的正常嗎？她真的…是我的主人嗎？

◆玩法

遊戲主要玩法是與美麗的“主人”一起生活，隨著劇情的發展，“主人”會對你進行各種不同的SM調教方式。
你的選擇會將你帶入不同的結局。

遊戲有大量頗具特色的H事件。
隨著遊戲發展，可以解鎖各種Ｈ體位。
甚至有奇妙的魔藥調教、魔法改造。

但是，在充滿桃色的甜蜜生活中，卻隱隱透露著一種違和感。
如果你堅持離開，將會面臨不可挽回的肉體調教。

你是選擇就此沉淪，還是想方設法逃離這間小屋呢？

◆遊戲特色

◇16張基本CG，包含差分200張以上。

◇遊戲文字5萬字。
◇調教抖M遊戲。
◇遊戲結局：4種

data.short_description: 你和一名美麗的魔女生活在林間小屋中，每天都過著與世無爭的性福生活，但是，如果你不聽話，或許會遭受殘酷的調教........
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 韓文, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Witch's Sexual Prison
data.detailed_description:
──Somehow everything around you felt unfamiliar.
“Indecent male dog should speak honestly~” the beautiful master trampled me on the ground and looked down at me.

◆Featured Systems

◇Full CG mode can be turned on in the environment setting, and HCG can be freely browsed.

◇Pressure-Free Operation Support one-click mouse operation-Fast text-to-text system

◆Story

Master said that I’m full of sexual desire
If I want to cure my perverted behavior, I should wear the chastity sheath
“Even the chastity sheath can’t cure you… seems that you need to be trained hard."

I had always been a very horny guy. I would think about H things all day that my master called me a male dog on heat…
But then I suddenly wanted to cure my perverted behavior
Could I succeed?

However, along with the training progress, I felt like I became more horny
Was that normal? Was she… really my master?

◆How to Play

The main gameplay is to live with your beautiful “master”. Along with the storyline development, the “master” would train you with various S&M methods.
Your choices will bring you to different endings.

This game has many unique H events.
Along with the game progress, you may unlock various H positions.
There are even fantastic potion training and magical transformation.

But in your sweet sexual life, you slightly felt indisposed.
If you insisted on leaving, you would face the irreversible physical training.

Would you choose your downfall or try to escape that small house?

◆Game Characteristic

◇16 Basic CG, Including More Than 200 Different Pictures

◇Game Text: 50.000 words
◇Training M Game
◇Game Ending：4 Types

data.short_description: You and a beautiful witch lived in a small house amongst the forest, living a life full of sex every day, but if you didn’t listen to her, you would probably get trained cruelly.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Turkish
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
